likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the fish section.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the fish section.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-shuh-REEUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a peixaria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay with card
phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar com cartão nesta banca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR KOHM kuh-ruh-TOWN NEHSH-tuh BAHNNG-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Vendors typically keep portable card readers at their stalls; always request directly.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, peça a máquina ao vendedor.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEH-suh AH MAH-kee-nuh OW vayng-dih-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask the vendor for the machine.

responses.english: Good morning, ask the vendor for the machine.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEH-suh AH MAH-kee-nuh OW vayng-dih-DOHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, peça a máquina ao vendedor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the meat counters are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os balcões de carne tradicionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH bahl-KOHNYSH DIH KAH-ruh-nih truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional meat stalls are clustered together and often operate on a cash-first basis.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os balcões de carne tradicionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH bahl-KOHNYSH DIH KAH-ruh-nih truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the traditional meat counters.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the traditional meat counters.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH bahl-KOHNYSH DIH KAH-ruh-nih truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para os balcões de carne tradicionais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish section is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a secção de peixe fresca?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH SEH-sown DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Peixaria opens early with daily catches, requiring prompt visits for best selection.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a Peixaria fica ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH pay-shuh-REEUH FEE-kuh OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the fish section is at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, the fish section is at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH pay-shuh-REEUH FEE-kuh OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, a Peixaria fica ao fundo.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço com vista para a marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço com vista para a marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the terrace with a view of the marina.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the terrace with a view of the marina.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o terraço com vista para a marina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for restaurant food
phrases.text_local: Onde se paga a refeição do restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH PAH-guh AH reh-fay-SOWN DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Restaurant payments are processed at a dedicated register, separate from market stall transactions.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou vá à caixa do restaurante.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW VAH AH KEYE-shuh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter or go to the restaurant's cashier.

responses.english: Ask the waiter or go to the restaurant's cashier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW VAH AH KEYE-shuh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih.
responses.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou vá à caixa do restaurante.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the restaurant terrace is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço do restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: The upper floor terrace offers direct marina views, ideal for late afternoon dining.

likely_response.translation_en: It is on the upper floor.

responses.english: It is on the upper floor.
